modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access one document on network share drive

full_description_text: The user is experiencing an issue where they can open all files in a specific folder on the network share, except for one document. When attempting to access this particular file, they receive an "Access denied" error message. This problem is occurring in a Windows 10 environment while using the network (X) drive. The user is seeking assistance to resolve this access issue.
